response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, testing, mentoring via workshops) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume shows only ~1 year of explicit GenAI/agentic work, no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or major cloud AI platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure AI services). The 8+ years of production AI requirement is not met, and Python is absent from the skills list. Strong generalist with relevant adjacent skills, but a stretch for a Staff GenAI FDE role.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq
Deep full-stack and TypeScript/Node experience with strong testing/CI/CD discipline
Proven technical leadership: workshops, mentoring, conference talks, founding GISCollective
concerns: No 8+ years of production AI/GenAI experience — only ~1 year of explicit AI work
Python absent from skills; no demonstrated RAG, vector DB, or LangGraph/CrewAI experience
Limited evidence of major-cloud AI platform delivery (AWS CDK mentioned, but not AI services on AWS/GCP/Azure)
